payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Close-up of a partial black glossy leather couch backrest showing three vertical padded segments with stitched seams, creases and reflective highlights; crop is edge-cut and shows only the top/back of the cushion and a small right-side detail; approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"black glossy leather couch back","long_description":"Close-up of a partial black glossy leather couch backrest showing three vertical padded segments with stitched seams, creases and reflective highlights; crop is edge-cut and shows only the top/back of the cushion and a small right-side detail; approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.","attributes":["black color","glossy leather material","backrest visible","three vertical padded segments","stitched seams","surface creases","reflective highlights","partial/edge-cropped","close distance ~0.8 m"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
